title: VPN connectivity issues for remote access to checkout-svc
description: Remote engineers unable to connect to internal checkout-svc via VPN. Connection drops after 626 seconds. Issue started at 07:32 affecting 626 users.
resolution: VPN gateway certificate expired causing TLS handshake failure. Renewed gateway certificate and restarted VPN service. Configured certificate expiry monitoring for 30-day advance warning.

title: api-gateway service returning incorrect calculation results
description: Users reporting wrong totals from api-gateway billing calculation. Off by 104 percent in some edge cases. Issue started after version update deployed at 03:05.
resolution: Floating point rounding error introduced in refactored calculation method. Reverted to integer arithmetic with explicit decimal handling. Deployed fix and re-processed affected transactions.

title: Cache miss rate spike in inventory-svc Redis cluster
description: Redis cache miss rate jumped from 5 percent to 56 percent for inventory-svc. Database load increased tenfold due to cache bypass. All read endpoints degraded. Response time now 56ms.
resolution: Cache TTL was accidentally set to zero after config deployment. Reset TTL to 3600 seconds and ran cache warm-up job. Miss rate back to 4 percent within 15 minutes.

title: Brute force login attempts detected against payment-svc
description: Brute force pattern detected on payment-svc login endpoint. 185 failed attempts in 5 minutes from same IP range. Some attempts using valid usernames obtained from prior data breach.
resolution: Blocked offending IP range at WAF level immediately. Enforced MFA for all accounts that received failed attempts. Security team notified. SIEM correlation rule updated.

title: Database connection timeout on billing-svc
description: Users experiencing connection timeouts on billing-svc. Error logs show max_connections exceeded. Pool exhausted after 521 retries. JDBC pool showing all 521 connections in use with no idle slots.
resolution: Increased connection pool size from 50 to 200 in application config. Restarted DB service to clear stale connections. Added connection timeout=30s and validation query to pool settings.

title: High CPU usage on billing-svc server
description: CPU utilization above 90 percent for 173 minutes on billing-svc. Memory also at 85 percent. All user-facing operations degraded. Top process shows billing-svc worker consuming 94 percent CPU.
resolution: Identified runaway worker process stuck in infinite retry loop. Killed process and restarted service gracefully. Added auto-scaling rule to provision new instance at 75 percent CPU.

title: inventory-svc pod crash loop in Kubernetes cluster
description: Kubernetes pod for inventory-svc in CrashLoopBackOff state. Restarting every 455 seconds. Events show OOMKilled reason. Pod has restarted 455 times in the last hour.
resolution: Memory limit of 512Mi was too low for current workload. Updated deployment memory limit to 2Gi and request to 1Gi. Pod stable after update. Added memory usage alert at 80 percent.

resolution: Blocked offending IP range at WAF level immediately. Enforced MFA for all accounts that received failed attempts. Security team notified. SIEM correlation rule updated.

title: VPN connectivity issues for remote access to inventory-svc
description: Remote engineers unable to connect to internal inventory-svc via VPN. Connection drops after 269 seconds. Issue started at 17:30 affecting 269 users.
resolution: VPN gateway certificate expired causing TLS handshake failure. Renewed gateway certificate and restarted VPN service. Configured certificate expiry monitoring for 30-day advance warning.

title: Cache miss rate spike in api-gateway Redis cluster
description: Redis cache miss rate jumped from 5 percent to 733 percent for api-gateway. Database load increased tenfold due to cache bypass. All read endpoints degraded. Response time now 733ms.
resolution: Cache TTL was accidentally set to zero after config deployment. Reset TTL to 3600 seconds and ran cache warm-up job. Miss rate back to 4 percent within 15 minutes.

title: Disk space critical on search-svc database node
description: Disk usage at 538 percent on search-svc database production node. Write operations will fail when disk is full. Binary logs consuming 80GB with auto-purge disabled.
resolution: Purged binary logs older than 7 days, freed 90GB of space. Re-enabled auto-purge with 3-day retention policy. Extended EBS volume from 500GB to 1TB as permanent solution.

title: API keys exposed in inventory-svc public repository
description: Production API keys for inventory-svc found committed to public GitHub repo. Keys have been publicly visible for 700 hours. Potential unauthorized access to external services.
resolution: Rotated all exposed API keys immediately. Audited API usage logs for unauthorized calls. Added git-secrets pre-commit hook to prevent future exposure.

title: Database connection timeout on search-svc
description: Users experiencing connection timeouts on search-svc. Error logs show max_connections exceeded. Pool exhausted after 753 retries. JDBC pool showing all 753 connections in use with no idle slots.
resolution: Increased connection pool size from 50 to 200 in application config. Restarted DB service to clear stale connections. Added connection timeout=30s and validation query to pool settings.

resolution: Added composite index on (user_id, created_at). Query time reduced to 45ms. Ran ANALYZE to update table statistics. Added slow query alerting at 200ms threshold.

title: Unauthorized data access attempt detected in billing-svc
description: Audit logs show user account accessing 432 records outside normal patterns. Access at 15:48 which is outside business hours. Data accessed includes PII fields not normally required for this role.

title: Database connection timeout on search-svc

resolution: Increased connection pool size from 50 to 200 in application config. Restarted DB service to clear stale connections. Added connection timeout=30s and validation query to pool settings.

title: Primary database failover triggered unexpectedly on inventory-svc
description: Automatic failover triggered on inventory-svc primary database at 04:49. Read replica promoted to primary. Application reconnecting. Root cause unknown. 331 transactions may be affected.
resolution: Primary node experienced kernel OOM and was killed by OS. Failover completed successfully in 45 seconds. Increased primary node memory from 16GB to 32GB to prevent recurrence.

title: Database replication lag on api-gateway read replica
description: Replication lag growing on read replica for api-gateway. Currently at 743 seconds. Read queries returning stale data to users. Primary write load very high since 17:17.
resolution: Network saturation was causing replication lag. Prioritized replication traffic via QoS rules. Lag cleared in 20 minutes. Added replication lag alert at 30 seconds.

title: Network packet loss between checkout-svc and database cluster
description: Intermittent 344 percent packet loss between app servers and DB cluster. Latency increased from 2ms to 450ms on all database queries. Traceroute shows drops at node-3 hop.
resolution: Faulty NIC on node-3 causing packet drops at hardware level. Replaced NIC. Network bonding handled failover automatically. No data loss. Latency back to 1.8ms average.

title: Database connection timeout on inventory-svc
description: Users experiencing connection timeouts on inventory-svc. Error logs show max_connections exceeded. Pool exhausted after 107 retries. JDBC pool showing all 107 connections in use with no idle slots.
resolution: Increased connection pool size from 50 to 200 in application config. Restarted DB service to clear stale connections. Added connection timeout=30s and validation query to pool settings.

title: api-gateway pod crash loop in Kubernetes cluster
description: Kubernetes pod for api-gateway in CrashLoopBackOff state. Restarting every 115 seconds. Events show OOMKilled reason. Pod has restarted 115 times in the last hour.
resolution: Memory limit of 512Mi was too low for current workload. Updated deployment memory limit to 2Gi and request to 1Gi. Pod stable after update. Added memory usage alert at 80 percent.

title: Login service authentication failures for user-svc

resolution: JWT secret key rotation during deployment caused token verification failures. Redeployed auth-service with correct HMAC secret. All active sessions invalidated and users prompted to re-login.
